prerequisites: A Circa account with an organization at app.circa.co.
Access to the organization's Org Settings, so you can reach the Integrations > API page where the API Secret Key is shown.
A value for the required start_date field.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Circa authenticates every REST API request with your organization's API Secret Key, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer {API_KEY}). Provide this value in the connector's api_key field. The API base URL is https://app.circa.co/api/v1.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your Circa API Secret Key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Circa organization at app.circa.co. Open Org Settings > Integrations > API and copy the API Secret Key shown on that page. Keep it secure.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied API Secret Key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as a Bearer token to authenticate against https://app.circa.co/api/v1.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field, which the connector uses as the replication start date for the data it loads.
